<?php namespace Illuminate\Queue; use RuntimeException; class MaxAttemptsExceededException extends RuntimeException { /** * The job instance. * * @var \Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\Job|null */ public $job; /** * Create a new instance for the job. * * @param \Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\Job $job * @return static */ public static function forJob($job) { return tap(new static($job->resolveName().' has been attempted too many times.'), function ($e) use ($job) { $e->job = $job; }); } }
